library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)
library(ggh4x)

data<-readRDS("./metadata.rds")
out_dir <- "figures"               
dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

pt_size <- 1   

custom_colors <- c(
  "Heart"  = "#EB8C86",
  "Kidney" = "#EED314",
  "Muscle" = "#3498CB",
  "Liver"  = "#339848",
  "Lung"   = "#895b8a"
)

data$tissue <- factor(data$tissue, levels = names(custom_colors))

#=========================================================
#=========================================================
axis_trunc <- ggh4x::guide_axis_truncated(
  trunc_lower = unit(0, "npc"),
  trunc_upper = unit(3, "cm")
)

p_umap <- ggplot(data, aes(x = UMAP_1, y = UMAP_2, color = tissue)) +
  geom_point(size = pt_size, stroke = 0) + # stroke = 0 
  theme_classic() + 
  guides(
    x = axis_trunc, 
    y = axis_trunc,
    color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 5)) 
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = custom_colors, drop = FALSE) +
  labs(x = "UMAP_1", y = "UMAP_2") +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 18, hjust = 0, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 18, hjust = 0, angle = 90, face = "bold"),
    axis.line = element_line(
      arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.3, "cm"), ends = "last", type = "closed"),
      linewidth = 1.5
    ),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_blank(),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 18),
    legend.title = element_blank()
  )

print(p_umap)

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(out_dir, "Fig1C_tissue_umap.pdf"),
  plot = p_umap,
  width = 8, height = 7, dpi = 300
)

meta_data <- data %>%
  group_by(tissue) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(tissue = factor(tissue, levels = names(custom_colors)))

p_bar <- ggplot(meta_data, aes(x = tissue, y = n, fill = tissue)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = custom_colors, drop = FALSE) +
  scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = c(20000, 50000, 80000), 
    labels = scales::number_format(),
    expand = c(0, 0),
    limits = c(0, 100000)           
  ) +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.5),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold", color = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold", color = "black", hjust = 1),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),    
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = margin(20, 20, 20, 20)
  ) +
  labs(y = "Cell Number")

print(p_bar)

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(out_dir, "Fig1C_tissue_number.pdf"),
  plot = p_bar,
  width = 6, height = 7, dpi = 300
)
